title: Blue Crystal Plastic Pacifier (5cm) Pack of 4 - Baby Shower Party Decorations, Ideal Keepsake for Guests
features: ADORABLE BLUE CRYSTAL DESIGN: Give your baby shower a touch of elegance with our blue crystal plastic pacifier, showcasing a stunning and unique design that will be an instant hit with your guests.
HIGH-QUALITY PLASTIC MATERIAL: Our 5cm pacifiers are made from durable, non-toxic plastic to ensure a long-lasting and safe keepsake for your guests to treasure for years to come.

PERFECT BABY SHOWER DECORATION: Add a stylish and cute touch to your celebration with these blue crystal pacifiers, ideal for centerpieces, cake toppers, or as table scatter, creating an unforgettable party atmosphere.
PACK OF 4: Great value for your money! Each package comes with 4 charming blue crystal plastic pacifiers, allowing for cohesive decor or multiple baby shower favors for your guests.

IDEAL KEEPSAKE FOR GUESTS: Show your appreciation to party attendees with these precious pacifiers as tokens of gratitude, creating special memories of your baby shower that will be cherished by your loved ones.
description: Product Description Thank all the guests who came to your party and send them home with these party favors featuring blue pacifiers. Your guests will be thrilled to take home these party favors as a memento of your occasion. Box Contains 4 x PACIFIER 2'' BLUE CRYSTL FAV
